title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Spiral Review
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a zero-diff formatting gate after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Formatter Choice · changed case

content.text: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates format style. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Formatter Choice, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a zero-diff formatting gate.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Formatting preferences should be enforced manually in review. This fails the Formatter Choice contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Format Migration applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Introduce or replace formatting with isolated reviewable migration commits.
